}

var mdc_sc = document.getElementById('mdc_sc');
var mdc_logo=document.getElementById('mdc_logo');
var mdc_company=document.getElementById('mdc_company');
var mdc_city=document.getElementById('mdc_city');
var mdc_details=document.getElementsByClassName('mdc_details')[0];
var mdc_div = document.getElementsByClassName('ts_inner_ln')[0];
var mdc_body = document.getElementsByClassName('FCP')[0];
var ver_dtls = document.getElementsByClassName('ver_dtls')[0];
function supplier_verfied_grey(verifyhash, companyName, city_state){

	if(mdc_logo.innerHTML.trim() == ''){
		mdc_logo.innerHTML = '<img alt="im Logo" id="mdc_logo" class="mt10" src="https://hm.imimg.com/template-mdc/imLogo1.png">';
	}
	mdc_cert.classList.remove("mdc_dn");
	mdc_sc.classList.remove("mdc_dn");
	document.body.style.overflow = "hidden";
	mdc_company.innerHTML=companyName;
	mdc_city.innerHTML=city_state;
	var li_ver = '';
	mdc_detals = 0;
	var mdc_usr_detals = 0;
	var mdc_usr = '';
	for(var mdc_prop in verifyhash) {
		if(verifyhash[mdc_prop] != "" && mdc_prop != "ver_mob" && mdc_prop != "ver_mail" && mdc_prop != "GSTIN"){
			mdc_usr_detals=1;
			mdc_usr+='<li><span class="wsnw" >'+mdc_prop.replace('_',' ')+':  </span><span class="fwm">'+verifyhash[mdc_prop]+'</span></li>';
		}

		else if(mdc_prop == "GSTIN" && verifyhash[mdc_prop] != ""){
			mdc_detals=1;
			li_ver='<li><svg class="svgIcn ts_tik"><use xlink:href = "#tik"/></svg><span class="wsnw" >GSTIN  </span><span class="fwm">'+verifyhash[mdc_prop]+'</span></li>';
			mdc_details.insertAdjacentHTML( 'beforeend', li_ver );
		}
		else if(mdc_prop == "ver_mob" && verifyhash[mdc_prop] != ""){
			mdc_detals=1;
			li_ver='<li><svg class="svgIcn ts_tik"><use xlink:href = "#tik"/></svg><span class="wsnw">Mobile Number  </span></li>';
			mdc_details.insertAdjacentHTML( 'beforeend', li_ver );
		}
		else if(mdc_prop == "ver_mail" && verifyhash[mdc_prop] != ""){
			mdc_detals=1;
			li_ver='<li><svg class="svgIcn ts_tik"><use xlink:href = "#tik"/></svg><span class="wsnw">Email Id  </span></li>';
			mdc_details.insertAdjacentHTML( 'beforeend', li_ver );
		}
	}
	if(mdc_detals ==1){
		ver_dtls.innerText = 'Following details of the company have been verified';
	}
	if(mdc_usr_detals == 1){
		mdc_details.insertAdjacentHTML( 'beforeend', '<li><p class="fs12 clr2 mt6">User declared information'+mdc_usr+'</p></li>' );
	}
		if (mdc_body) {
		mdc_body.style.overflow = "hidden";
	} else {
		document.body.style.overflow = "hidden";
	}


}

mdc_cert.onclick = function(e) {
    if(e.target != mdc_div) {
		close_cert_grey();

    }
}
	document.body.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
    if(e.key == "Escape"){
    	close_cert_grey();
    }
});
	
function close_cert_grey(){
		if(!(mdc_cert.classList.contains('mdc_dn'))){
		mdc_cert.classList.add("mdc_dn");
		mdc_sc.classList.add("mdc_dn");
		mdc_details.innerHTML = "";
		mdc_company.innerHTML='';
		mdc_city.innerHTML='';
       		// Always reset both to avoid stuck scroll
		if (mdc_body) {
			mdc_body.style.overflow = "auto";
		}

		document.body.style.overflow = "auto";
	}
	}
</script>

function manualEncrypt(data, key = 'FCP123') {
    let out = '';
    for (let i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
        out += String.fromCharCode(data.charCodeAt(i) ^ key.charCodeAt(i % key.length));
    }
    return btoa(out);
}

function manualDecrypt(data, key = 'FCP123') {
    const decoded = atob(data);
    let out = '';
    for (let i = 0; i < decoded.length; i++) {
        out += String.fromCharCode(decoded.charCodeAt(i) ^ key.charCodeAt(i % key.length));
    }
    return out;
}
function setCookieIfNeeded(cityId) {
    const encrypted = manualEncrypt(cityId);
    document.cookie = "minct=" + encrypted + ";path=/;max-age=" + (86400); // 1 day
    return encrypted;
}
function readminctCookie(name) {
    const nameEQ = name + "=";
    const cookies = document.cookie.split(';');
    for (let i = 0; i < cookies.length; i++) {
        let c = cookies[i].trim();
        if (c.indexOf(nameEQ) === 0) {
            return c.substring(nameEQ.length);
        }
    }
    return null;
}

function setupRecommendationObserver(event_name) {
    const target = document.getElementById('recommend_data');

    if (!target) {
        console.warn("recommend_data not found");
        return;
    }
    setTimeout(() => {
        if (!target.innerHTML.trim()) {
            console.warn("recommend_data is empty");
            return;
        }
        const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries, observer) => {
            entries.forEach(entry => {
                // console.log("Observed entry", entry); // Debug
                if (entry.isIntersecting && entry.intersectionRatio >= 0.4) {
                    reqFormGATrack("Recommendation Impressions", event_name, '', '');
                    observer.unobserve(entry.target);
                }
            });
        }, {
            threshold: [0.4, 0.5, 0.6, 0.7, 0.8]
        });

        observer.observe(target);
    }, 200); // Adjust delay as needed
}
